APPROVE
Token migration is clean and complete: all gray/blue Tailwind utilities are replaced with semantic tokens (`border-line`, `bg-elevated`, `fg-ink/muted`, `accent-lever`, `error`), corners are squared, and the status select gains the tint+border pattern via CSS custom properties. No behavioral changes; snapshot baselines refreshed.
